creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 192973
svn diff to upgrade to 0.40.2

gohugo has been updated to 0.40.2
(https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases/tag/v0.40.2):

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.40.1 to 0.40.2

Change log:
 - Reset .Page.Scratch on live-reload
 - Fix .WordCount, .FuzzyWordCount, .ReadingTime when summary marker is set

Tested against amd64/i386 10.4-RELEASE, 11.1-RELEASE, 11.1-STABLE, and 12.0-CURRENT. Poudriere logs attached, and also found here for a limited time:
https://logs.bnix.club/gohugo-0.40.2_2018-05-01/

portlint -AC:
looks fine.

poudriere bulk -tC:
10_4-RELEASE__amd64: success
10_4-RELEASE__i386: success
11_1-RELEASE__amd64: success
11_1-RELEASE__i386: couldn't get jail to start...
11_1-STABLE__amd64: success
11_1-STABLE__i386: success
12_0-CURRENT__amd64: success
12_0-CURRENT__i386: success
